content.en:
In the blink of an eye, three thousand six hundred pieces of high-grade eternal gold, plus other precious materials, were all integrated into the magic circle.

Ultimately.

The Tailing Origin Circle has been successfully constructed.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian was very excited, as long as he opened this Tailing Origin Array, he could face the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, so that he could slowly comprehend the rules of the origin on the other side.

"Even if the five hundred primeval era can't comprehend, then rebuild a Tailing Origin Array and continue to comprehend!"

After Ye Tian had this plan, he directly opened the Tailing Origin Array.

Rumble!!!!!

Tailing's Origin Circle was opened.

Click!

The power of the Tailing Origin Circle penetrated through the Infinite Void, straight into the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, and the energy of the pieces of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold was slowly consumed, and after about five hundred primeval eras, this magic circle would be completely scrapped.

......

Guheng Mountain.

The Lord of Eternal Zero sensed the fluctuations of Tailing's Origin Array, and was immediately alarmed.

"It's ......"

The Lord of Eternal Zero immediately appeared in Ye Tian's retreat.

"It's the Origin Circle!!"

He knew that this was Ye Tian's residence, that was to say, Ye Tianjian had created the Tailing Origin Array.

"How is this possible, the Tailing Origin Formation requires three thousand six hundred pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold, the entire Guheng Mountain can't make up so much high-grade eternal ancient gold, where did the Endless Lord get so much high-grade eternal ancient gold?"

He didn't understand.

Whew!!!

The other deputy mountain lords also arrived one by one, and even the lord of Gu Heng also came.

"This is the Origin Array, who built it?" asked the Lord of Gu Heng.

"This is the residence of the Endless Lord, could it be the Endless Lord?" said one of the deputy mountain lords in surprise.

The Lord of Eternal Zero nodded, "Everyone, it should be the Origin Circle built by the Lord of Endless. Not long ago, he exchanged the Tailing Origin Array Inheritance with me, and it was built so quickly!"

"What, this is the Tailing Origin Array, no wonder the fluctuations are so big, wouldn't that consume three thousand six hundred pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold!!"

These deputy mountain masters were stunned and shocked.

That's three thousand six hundred pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold, they can't make it up, but Ye Tian made it up so quickly, how did this happen?

They were puzzled!

At the beginning, in order to gather a thousand high-grade eternal gold, they also used the long years to make up one piece after another of the high-grade eternal gold, and they also made up an unknown number of thousands of primeval epochs before they finally made it up.

Then, there were still some opportunities, and I was lucky enough to realize the ordinary origin rules, so as to break through to the origin realm.

Quite the hardships at the beginning, and compared to the Endless Lord, they suddenly became a little envious and jealous!

"The Lord of Endless easily took out three thousand six hundred pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold, could there be more high-grade eternal ancient gold in his hand?" the Lord of Gu Heng muttered.

"Even if he had, he wouldn't be able to trade it!" said the Lord of Eternal Zero, shaking his head.

How precious the fine eternal gold is, no one will dislike it!

"He is the lord of Gu Heng Mountain, I am the lord of the mountain, you are the deputy lord of the mountain, he should give a little face!" said the lord of Gu Heng.

And the Lord of Eternal Zero hurriedly said: "Mountain Lord, the Lord of Endless is not an ordinary genius on the other side, he has already completed the transformation of the golden body on the other side, and has practiced the heart of the other side, the golden blood of the other side, and the golden bones of the other side, just like the original Lord of Taichao." Not only that, but his current will has also reached the will of the Origin Realm, and his current combat power alone is comparable to the other side level genius of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm. Even the weaker Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors would not be able to kill him easily, and would even be escaped by him. And once he comprehended the Origin Rules of the Other Side, and became the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor in the future, there would be no obstacles. Therefore, we can't treat him according to the bone transformation realm, as long as he doesn't fall, he will definitely surpass us in the future!"

The Lord of Gu Heng frowned, and he also knew that what the Lord of Eternal Zero said was very reasonable.

It is true that the Lord of Endless is the lord of Gu Heng Mountain, but once he deliberately offends him, it is not a good thing!

"When he gets out, I'll ask him where he got the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, that's all right, maybe he has found a brand new treasure land, if we can also enter that treasure land, maybe there is also hope to get a lot of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold!" Gu Heng said.

"You can ask!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero nodded slightly.

......

Within the Tailing Origin Circle.

Ye Tian stood here, and the void in front of him presented the origin of the land on the other side of eternity.

And that origin is like an unimaginable golden sun, shining on endless time and space, but in fact it is not a great sun, but a condensed body of the source.

Then.

Ye Tian noticed that there were some cracks in this golden great Japanese source, which had obviously been traumatized and had not yet recovered.

"The origin fragments in those treasure lands should have fallen out of the cracks, maybe there were incomparably terrifying powerhouses who fought in the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, which caused such a crack!" Ye Tian guessed.

He tried to get closer to his roots in the Eternal Lands, but an invisible force held him down, preventing him from moving on.

"I can only stay here and understand, I can't continue to approach, but it's okay!"

He sat cross-legged and began to comprehend the origin of the land beyond eternity.

Compared to before, his comprehension has improved a lot, so the effect of enlightenment is better.

Subsequently.

He began a long period of enlightenment.

One primeval epoch after another has passed, and Ye Tian has been enlightened and has no other thoughts.

Gradually, he had a little understanding of the original rules of the other side.

There is a big gap between the ordinary origin rule and the other side origin rule, and the ordinary origin rule is equivalent to an ultra-weakened version of the other side origin rule.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also made a discovery, that is, the golden text on the other side and the black text on the other side are actually the derivatives of the original rules of the other side.

And he has understood a lot of the golden text and the black text on the other side, which is also helpful for him to understand the original rules of the other side.

However.

Within the five hundred primeval eras, whether he can comprehend the origin rules of the other side is really not certain.

Of course, he hoped that he could realize.

Time flies, and unconsciously, more than 400 primeval epochs have passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

A more powerful Origin Rule permeated Ye Tian's body, directly engulfing the previous Origin Rule.

"The rules of the origin of the other side, comprehend the !!"

Ye Tian burst out laughing!

Now, the biggest problem that was restricting him from breaking through the Origin Realm has been solved.

As long as he cultivated to the extreme of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm in the future, he could directly impact the Origin Realm without any bottlenecks.
